allow: PowerShell(ipconfig /flushdns | Out-Null; "Flushed."; "Default resolver:"; \(Resolve-DnsName softy.uz -Type A -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.IPAddress} | Select-Object -First 1\).IPAddress; "Via Cloudflare 1.1.1.1:"; \(Resolve-DnsName softy.uz -Type A -Server 1.1.1.1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.IPAddress} | Select-Object -First 1\).IPAddress)

PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { python --version } else { Write-Output "python yo'q" }; $pyl = \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($pyl\) { py --version } else { Write-Output "py launcher yo'q" })

PowerShell($candidates = @\("C:\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\src\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "D:\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "$env:USERPROFILE\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\tools\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "D:\\sdk\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path $c\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $c" } }; Get-ChildItem "C:\\", "D:\\", "$env:USERPROFILE" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'flutter|fvm' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)
PowerShell($flutter = Get-Command flutter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($flutter\) { $flutter.Source } else { "not on path" })

PowerShell($sdk = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk"; Get-ChildItem $sdk -Directory | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; Write-Output '---'; Get-ChildItem "$sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe", "$sdk\\emulator\\emulator.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)
